_comment: Claude Code hooks for the unified agent-state watch. MERGE the `hooks` block into <cwd>/.claude/settings.json (project) or ~/.claude/settings.json. Replace ABS with the absolute path to agent-watch/hooks/emit-from-stdin.sh. Launch interactive `claude` in tmux with env AGENT_WATCH_SESSION=<tmux session> (Notification fires in interactive mode only, not `claude -p`). idle_prompt = turn yielded to user (treat as DONE); permission_prompt = WAITING for approval.
